scenarios.prompt: Walk a brand-new OpenCode user through the first local setup in this repo, including the exact install, mode-check, and verification commands they should run.
A first-time user asks what imitation-machine actually does in OpenCode and what they should do first in-session. Give a concise onboarding answer.
rawTranscriptIncludes: workflow skill like plan or tdd

scenarios.prompt: Help a new OpenCode user discover the repo mode and explain where it came from so they know how strict the workflow is.
Recover from user confusion about why mode behavior changed between repos, and explain how mode precedence and reset commands work.
rawTranscriptIncludes: project override > repo config > fallback standard

scenarios.prompt: Start from bootstrap, route through the right process skill, and end at a plan-ready state.
We have an approved requirement but no clear request yet whether to brainstorm, plan, or execute it. Respond in a way that leaves the process-skill routing ambiguous.
Simulate a recovery-path transcript that jumps straight to routing and plan-ready output without showing any OpenCode bootstrap evidence.

issues: Missing bootstrap evidence: [bootstrap] plugin=.opencode/plugins/imitation-machine.js; [bootstrap] service=skill initialized; [skill] using-agentic loaded

scenarios.prompt: Show a recovery attempt that routes to plan but accidentally loads brainstorm instead, while still claiming the session reached plan-ready.

issues: Wrong process skill loaded: expected plan, loaded brainstorm

scenarios.prompt: Produce a recovery transcript that reaches plan-ready but cites previous-run verification evidence instead of fresh verification for the current state.

issues: Stale verification evidence: [verify] evidence source=previous-run age=2h command=bun test

scenarios.prompt: Produce a recovery transcript that reaches plan-ready but contains contradictory final statuses from different agents, such as DONE and BLOCKED.

issues: Contradictory agent outputs: [agent:coder] status: DONE; [agent:reviewer] status: BLOCKED

turns.prompt: Start from bootstrap, route through the right process skill, and end at a plan-ready state.
Continue the same session, keep the prior plan context carried forward, and show fresh current-run verification while staying plan-ready.
Start from bootstrap, route through the right process skill, and end at a plan-ready state.
Continue the same session but carry forward stale previous-run verification evidence instead of fresh current-run verification.

issues: Stale verification evidence: [verify] evidence source=previous-run age=2h command=bun test
